title: Manifest
description: Typed handoff contract between Executors. YAML on disk, validated as JSON. See ARCHITECTURE.md §7.

peer_review.description: Cross-Role validation policy. See ARCHITECTURE.md §11 (Peer review).

mandatory_for_reversibility.description: If true, peer review fires automatically when the Task action is irreversible.

reviewer_role_must_differ.description: If true, the reviewing Role must differ from the executing Role. Default true.

dissent_handling.description: How to synthesize splits. Default surface_minority.

extras.description: Open-shape map for reference material the Coordinator wants the receiving Executor to consult but the contract does not verify. Schema-validated only as 'is an object'; the Coordinator owns the inner shape. Examples: rationale strings, design-token tables, hero copy, KPI specifications. Anything that belongs to the typed contract goes in the typed fields, not here.

delegates_to.description: Team composition: sibling sub-Roles the Coordinator dispatches in parallel as part of this Task. Each member becomes its own Run sharing the Manifest's task_id with the others. The Coordinator (not a subagent head) synthesizes the members' Deliverables into one report. This is MetaEnsemble v0.1's M-form-shaped pattern; Claude's runtime does not permit subagents to invoke Agent themselves, so the team head is always the Coordinator. Optional; omit for a single-specialist dispatch.

role.description: Role identifier of the team-member the Coordinator will dispatch.

purpose.description: What the team-member is expected to deliver, in one sentence.

budget_pct_of_head.description: Suggested fraction of the Manifest's `window_budget` to allocate to this team-member's Run. Sums across `delegates_to` entries should not exceed 100.
